title: Hiring Store Manager at Spar India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Spar India
jsonLd.description:
Spar India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
